The '''''Wanderhome''''' was a [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|Gallofree medium transport]] that evacuated [[Ranat/Legends|Ranat]] and [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]] refugees from [[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]] after the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was [[Battle of Gyndine|attacked]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''Wanderhome'' was also the name of a server — or ''Galaxy'' — in the video game ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.
